statement: In every magma, Equation 202 (`x = (y * z) * (w * u)`) implies Equation 2058 (`x = ((x * y) * x) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0438
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op x y) x) (op z z))
